title: Animated Film ‘Guardian Rabbits’ Joins Sola Media Slate at the European Film Market (EXCLUSIVE)
summary: Sales company Sola Media has added CGI animated film “Guardian Rabbits — the Secret of the Golden Egg” to its lineup at the European Film Market and has released the first image from the film. “Guardian Rabbits” is the third installment in the “Rabbit” universe, following “Rabbit School” and “Rabbi…
